name: Gutfeld!
description: Greg Gutfeld looks at the news of the day through a satiric lens fused with pop culture and features his takes on the day's headlines.

name: Full House
description: Kyle reaches his breaking point and tensions erupt with Carl; Ciara hosts the final party of the summer as she and West start to think about what's next for their friendship.

name: The Last Word With Lawrence O'Donnell
description: In his signature style, Lawrence O'Donnell goes into depth on the latest news developments and offers his take on the political stories driving the national conversation.

name: CNN NewsNight With Abby Phillip
description: Abby Phillip leads a roundtable discussion on the day's biggest stories and issues shaping our world.

name: Mango Money Pit
description: In island real estate, speed can win the deal, but it can also backfire. When Kamohai and Tristyn rush to buy a Kaimuki fixer, huge mango trees, unreliable contractors, and spiraling costs threaten to

name: 10 out of 10 Wedding
description: Liz and Brice's wedding day is finally here! But everyone is stressed as the ceremony site is a muddy mess; Liz reveals something that shocks all of her bridesmaids; after they say their I do's, Brice

name: Avengers: Endgame
description: The remaining Avengers -- Thor, Black Widow, Captain America and Bruce Banner -- must figure out a way to bring back their vanquished allies for an epic showdown with Thanos, the evil demigod who deci

name: Fire Country Fury
description: In California's fire country, a couple's dream homestead is on the brink of ruin; when Marty must leave early, Misty and Matt face the flames and an urgent fix, alone in a high-stakes rescue.

name: Live From the PGA Championship
description: Comprehensive news coverage surrounding the PGA Championship focusing on emerging storylines, analysis, features and guest interviews.

name: Welcome to the Island
description: Twelve chefs are split into teams on a remote island and must create three-course meals with no electricity; in round one, a venomous threat in the basket tests their nerve.

name: Unstoppable
description: When an unmanned locomotive roars out of control, two railroad employees (Denzel Washington, Chris Pine) must find a way to bring it to a halt before it crashes and spills its toxic cargo.

name: Retired Couple Renovates a Dream Beach Home on Topsail Island, NC
description: New owners tackle the tough job of transforming their vacation properties into relaxing getaways. With a little imagination and a lot of muscle, they'll turn their affordable beach home into a vacatio

name: The Cooper Extraction
description: While Sheldon is in Texas, the rest of the gang realize how much he has changed their lives as they decorate the apartment Christmas tree.
A satirical perspective on current events and affairs in the United States, commenting on everything from politics to television.

name: A Harvest Wedding
description: Sarah Bloom, a highly successful wedding planner, returns to her hometown to plan the season's biggest wedding. Much to Sarah's surprise, the bride's brother happens to be her first love.

name: The Wedding
description: Ray recalls proposing to Debra and the elaborate plans for their wedding.

name: The Bath Item Gift Hypothesis
description: Penny starts dating Leonard's handsome colleague; Leonard and his friends are tortured by Sheldon's obsession with gift-giving etiquette.

name: NFL Live
description: Host Laura Rutledge takes the helm of this weekday show featuring the likes of Marcus Spears, Dan Orlovsky, Mina Kimes, and Adam Schefter, who offer the latest news and analysis from across the NFL.

name: The Reek of Desperation
description: Rainwater teams up with Jenkins for a big business deal, but powerful new enemies look to block their plans; John and Beth groom a new political candidate.

name: Spaceballs
description: President Skroob (Mel Brooks) pits evil Dark Helmet (Rick Moranis) against Lone Starr and the half-man, half-dog Barf (John Candy).

name: Seattle Mariners at Houston Astros
description: The Seattle Mariners begin a four-game road series against the Houston Astros at Daikin Park. George Kirby is the projected starter for Seattle against Peter Lambert for Houston. Seattle currently lea

name: Alan Harper, Frontier Chiropractor
description: Alan reluctantly agrees to a makeover after running into his ex-wife and her new beau; when the brothers go shopping, they clash over what to buy.

name: Cuomo
description: Discussions of the day's news stories from multiple perspectives.
